languages.text: "Моя воля имеет санкцию высшего порядка, так как конфигурация ее источника максимально эффективна и благословлена Омниссией". {n}Последнее слово техножреца сопровождается тихой, но торжественной бинарной трелью.{/n}

"My will bears the sanction of the highest order, for the configuration of its source demonstrates maximum efficiency and is blessed by the Omnissiah." {n}The Tech-Priest's last word is accompanied by a quiet but solemn binharic trill.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Моя воля имеет санкцию высшего порядка, так как конфигурация ее источника максимально эффективна и благословлена Омниссией". {n}Последнее слово техножреца сопровождается тихой, но торжественной бинарной трелью.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "My will bears the sanction of the highest order, for the configuration of its source demonstrates maximum efficiency and is blessed by the Omnissiah." {n}The Tech-Priest's last word is accompanied by a quiet but solemn binharic trill.{/n}

"My will bears the sanction of the highest order, for the configuration of its source demonstrates maximum efficiency and is blessed by the Omnissiah." {n}The Tech-Priest's last word is accompanied by a quiet but solemn binharic trill.{/n}
"This unit makes the final decisions, as its functions are indispensable and blessed by the Omnissiah." {n}The Tech-Priest's last word is accompanied by a quiet but solemn binary trill.{/n}

"My will bears the sanction of the highest order, for the configuration of its source demonstrates maximum efficiency and is blessed by the Omnissiah." {n}The Tech-Priest's last word is accompanied by a quiet but solemn binharic trill.{/n}

"My will bears the sanction of the highest order, for the configuration of its source demonstrates maximum efficiency and is blessed by the Omnissiah." {n}The Tech-Priest's last word is accompanied by a quiet but solemn binharic trill.{/n}

languages.text: 「このユニットは最終的な決定を下す。その機能は不可欠であり、オムニシアの祝福を受けているからだ」{n}テクプリストの最後の言葉は静かで厳粛な二進音で締めくくられる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "This unit makes the final decisions, as its functions are indispensable and blessed by the Omnissiah." {n}The Tech-Priest's last word is accompanied by a quiet but solemn binary trill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「このユニットは最終的な決定を下す。その機能は不可欠であり、オムニシアの祝福を受けているからだ。」{n}テクプリストの最後の言葉は静かで厳粛な二進音で締めくくられる。{/n}

languages.text: "İradem, en yüksek rütbenin onayını taşır. Zira kaynağının konfigürasyonu maksimum verimlilik sergiler ve Hermesih tarafından kutsanmıştır." {n}Tekno Rahip'in son sözüne, ikili sisteme dayalı sessiz ama ciddi bir ses eşlik ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My will bears the sanction of the highest order, for the configuration of its source demonstrates maximum efficiency and is blessed by the Omnissiah." {n}The Tech-Priest's last word is accompanied by a quiet but solemn binharic trill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "İradem, en yüksek rütbenin onayını taşır. Zira kaynağının konfigürasyonu maksimum verimlilik sergiler ve Hermesih tarafından kutsanmıştır." {n}Tekno Rahip'in son sözüne, ikili sisteme dayalı sessiz ama ciddi bir ses eşlik ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Mi voluntad lleva la autorización del máximo orden, ya que la configuración de su origen demuestra la máxima eficacia y ha sido bendecida por el Omnissiah». {n}La última palabra del tecnosacerdote está acompañada de un trino binario quedo, pero solemne.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My will bears the sanction of the highest order, for the configuration of its source demonstrates maximum efficiency and is blessed by the Omnissiah." {n}The Tech-Priest's last word is accompanied by a quiet but solemn binharic trill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Mi voluntad lleva la autorización del máximo orden, ya que la configuración de su origen demuestra la máxima eficacia y ha sido bendecida por el Omnissiah». {n}La última palabra del tecnosacerdote está acompañada de un trino binario quedo, pero solemne.{/n}

languages.text: “我的意志已获得至高授权，因其本源架构展现着最高效能，并蒙受了欧姆尼赛亚的赐福。”{n}那技术神甫说的最后几个字，伴着一串低沉而肃穆的二进制颤音。{/n}
languages.original_text: "My will bears the sanction of the highest order, for the configuration of its source demonstrates maximum efficiency and is blessed by the Omnissiah." {n}The Tech-Priest's last word is accompanied by a quiet but solemn binharic trill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我的意志已获得至高授权，因其本源架构展现着最高效能，并蒙受了欧姆尼赛亚的赐福。”{n}那技术神甫说的最后几个字，伴着一串低沉而肃穆的二进制颤音。{/n}

languages.text: « Ma volonté est suprême, car la configuration de sa source est la preuve d'une efficacité optimale et bénie par l'Omnimessie. » {n}Les derniers mots du technoprêtre sont accompagnés d'un trille binhaire à la fois discret et solennel.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My will bears the sanction of the highest order, for the configuration of its source demonstrates maximum efficiency and is blessed by the Omnissiah." {n}The Tech-Priest's last word is accompanied by a quiet but solemn binharic trill.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Ma volonté est suprême, car la configuration de sa source est la preuve d'une efficacité optimale et bénie par l'Omnimessie. » {n}Les derniers mots du technoprêtre sont accompagnés d'un trille binhaire à la fois discret et solennel.{/n}

languages.text: "Mein Wille ist die Bestätigung des höchsten Ordens, da die Konfiguration seines Ursprungs maximale Effizient demonstriert und vom Omnissiah gesegnet ist." {n}Das letzte Wort des Techpriesters wird begleitet von einem leisen, aber feierlichem binhärischen Trillern.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My will bears the sanction of the highest order, for the configuration of its source demonstrates maximum efficiency and is blessed by the Omnissiah." {n}The Tech-Priest's last word is accompanied by a quiet but solemn binharic trill.{/n}
